Veterans Benefits: Georgia provides age- and income-conditional military-retirement income exclusions, a disabled-veteran homestead exemption, employment preference, education and tuition assistance, free veteran driver's licenses, vehicle tags, veterans nursing homes, and hunting and fishing privileges.
LGBTQSource: HRC Municipal Equality Index 2025 Savannah scorecard; MAP Georgia overall policy score
Description: Savannah is a coastal Georgia city with a large landmarked historic district, public squares, arts and dining, waterfront access, and nearby beaches. It has a local VA outpatient clinic and major regional hospitals. The city offers strong culture and outdoor amenities, but its 2024 violent-crime rate remains high relative to the national rate.
